description: Airline must have a valid IATA Operational Safety Audit (IOSA) registration.
Must operate scheduled or non-scheduled air services.
Complete the application form signed by the airline's Chief Executive Officer (CEO).
The application is submitted to the IATA Director General for consideration and approval once received.
Receipt of funds for the annual dues must be confirmed before final approval.
A flat annual amount paid by all IATA members.
Proportional amount based on international traffic volume (RTK).
Calculated based on Revenue Tonne Kilometres (RTK) with weightings for passenger and cargo.
Invoice submitted for IATA Clearing House (ICH) settlement after confirmation.
Final approval granted by the IATA Director General.
Membership team sends confirmation of membership letter to the applicant CEO.
